creator: snb@threerings.net
text:
Thanks for the update. The current VuXML entry isn't quite right  
still though, because it uses package names mediawiki19 and  
mediawiki18 for the ranges of MediaWiki 1.8.x and 1.9.x that are  
vulnerable to this. The mediawiki19 and mediawik18 ports install with  
a PKGNAME of mediawiki-version, just like www/mediawiki does.  
Attached is another tiny patch that puts all <range> elements in with  
the mediawiki <pkgname>.
